## HIGH: Rank-Deficient Constraint System

### Description
Constraint matrix has rank 2 but expected at least 13. This means 11 signals are under-constrained.

N/A

### Impact
Under-constrained signals allow multiple valid witnesses for the same public inputs, breaking soundness.

See attached witness files
```

### Recommendation
Add constraints to fully determine all private signals.

## HIGH: Rank-Deficient Constraint System

### Description
Constraint matrix has rank 0 but expected at least 80. This means 80 signals are under-constrained.

### Affected Signals
check, check, has, numeratorOfScaledPIR, has, slt, absInterestRate, numeratorOfScaledFeeRate, absInterestRate_numeratorOfScaledFeeRate_Product, has, remainingCollateralAmt, matchedAmt, matchedTSBTokenAmt, has, denominator, has, avlBQ_days_Product, avlBQ_days_priceMQ_Product, remainDays_priceBQ_Product, remainDays_priceBQ_avlBQ_Product, has, MQ_feeRate_Product, isMarketOrder, isMarketBuyOrder, remainTakerSellAmt, remainMakerSellAmt, remainTakerBuyAmt, remainMakerBuyAmt, matchedMakerSellAmtIfMQ, matchedMakerBuyAmtIfMQ, matchedMakerSellAmtIfBQ, matchedMakerBuyAmtIfBQ, matchedMakerSellAmtExpected, matchedMakerBuyAmtExpected, supMQ, slt, isSufficent, matchedMakerSellAmt, matchedMakerBuyAmt, isLend, isBorrow, isAuction, isSecondary, is2ndBuy, is2ndSell, feeIfLend, feeAsLend, feeIfBorrow, feeAsBorrow, feeRateIf2nd, feeIfBuy, feeIfSell, feeAsBuy, feeAsSell, feeIfSecondary, expectedFeeFromLocked, expectedFeeFromTarget, isFeeFromLocked, isFeeFromTarget, minFeeAmt, maxOriCreditAmtOriCumFeeAmt, newCreditAmtIfFromTarget, sgtNewCreditAmtOriCumFeeAmt, chargedCreditAmt, newCumFeeAmt, sgtNewCumFeeAmtNewCreditAmt, chargedFeeAmt, output, enabled, newCumLendingAmt, output, enabled0, enabled1, enabled, takerMqTokenId, makerMqTokenId, newCumTakerBuyAmt, output, enabled, newCumLendingAmt

### Affected Constraints
N/A

### Impact
Under-constrained signals allow multiple valid witnesses for the same public inputs, breaking soundness.

### Proof of Concept
```
See attached witness files
```

### Recommendation
Add constraints to fully determine all private signals.

### request.circom

## HIGH: Rank-Deficient Constraint System

### Description
Constraint matrix has rank 0 but expected at least 97. This means 97 signals are under-constrained.

### Affected Signals
input, oriNullifierTreeRoot, newNullifierTreeRoot, input, tmpChunks, bits, input, input, input, input, packedAmt, input, packedTxFeeAmt, input, input, digest, isLend, isBorrow, isAuc, is2nd, is2ndBuy, is2ndSell, daysFromMatched, daysFromExpired, isNegPIRIf2ndBuy, expectedLockFeeAmtIfLend, lockFeeAmtIfLend, expectedSellAmtIf2ndBuy, expectedLockFeeIf2ndBuy, maxMinFeeAmt, lockFeeIf2ndBuy, lockAmtIf2ndBuy, lock_amt, daysFromMatchedIfEnabled, MQ, BQ, packedAmount0, packedAmount1, packedMinFeeAmt0, packedMinFeeAmt1, input, isAuctionStart, input, digest, packedAmount0, packedAmount1, packedMinFeeAmt0, input, isAuction, isSecondaryLimit, isSecondaryMarket, isRoll, days, newLend, newTaker, newLendIfRoll, idx, feeFromLocked, enabledAndIsAuction, enabledAndIsSecondaryLimit, enabledAndIsSecondaryMarket, enabledAndIsRoll, newNewOrder1, isFull, refund, channelOutIfAuction, channelOutIfSecondary, channelOutIfRoll, input, isAuction, isSecondaryLimit, feeFromLocked, enabledAndIsAuction, newOrder, isFull, refund, debtAmtIfAuction, input, feeFromLocked, input, input, packedTxFeeAmt, input, input, treeId, input, input, input, input, input, input, input, debtAmt, daysFromMatched, fee, input, input

### Affected Constraints
N/A

### Impact
Under-constrained signals allow multiple valid witnesses for the same public inputs, breaking soundness.

### Proof of Concept
```
See attached witness files
```

### Recommendation
Add constraints to fully determine all private signals.

## HIGH: Rank-Deficient Constraint System

### Description
Constraint matrix has rank 1 but expected at least 55. This means 54 signals are under-constrained.

### Affected Signals
n2B[0], n2B[1], n2B[2], n2B[3], n2B[4], temp2[0], temp2[1], temp2[2], temp2[3], temp2[4], n2B_in[0], n2B_in[1], n2B_in[2], n2B_in[3], n2B_in[4], n2B_in[5], n2B_in[6], n2B_in[7], n2B_in[8], n2B_in[9], n2B_in[10], n2B_in[11], n2B_in[12], n2B_in[13], n2B_in[14], n2B_in[15], n2B_in[16], n2B_in[17], n2B_in[18], n2B_in[19], n2B_in[20], n2B_in[21], n2B_in[22], n2B_in[23], n2B_in[24], n2B_in[25], n2B_in[26], n2B_in[27], n2B_in[28], n2B_in[29], n2B_in[30], n2B_in[31], n2B_in[32], n2B_in[33], n2B_in[34], n2B_in[35], n2B_in[36], n2B_in[37], n2B_in[38], n2B_in[39], exp, temp, mantissa, temp, input

### Affected Constraints
N/A

### Impact
Under-constrained signals allow multiple valid witnesses for the same public inputs, breaking soundness.

## HIGH: Rank-Deficient Constraint System

### Description
Constraint matrix has rank 2 but expected at least 10. This means 8 signals are under-constrained.

### Affected Signals
slt, slt, tmp, bits_dividend, mask, dividend_, slt, temp, temp, n2B

### Affected Constraints
N/A

### Impact
Under-constrained signals allow multiple valid witnesses for the same public inputs, breaking soundness.

### Proof of Concept
```
See attached witness files

## HIGH: Rank-Deficient Constraint System

### Description
Constraint matrix has rank 0 but expected at least 5. This means 5 signals are under-constrained.

### Affected Signals
a10, a1, a0, a, s10

### Affected Constraints
N/A

### Impact
Under-constrained signals allow multiple valid witnesses for the same public inputs, breaking soundness.

### Proof of Concept
```
See attached witness files
```

### Recommendation
Add constraints to fully determine all private signals.
